techcrunch.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
techcrunch.summary: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

techcrunch.title: Elon Musk can’t hear you over the sound of his $1.75 trillion IPO
techcrunch.summary: The SpaceX S-1 is finally here, and the story it tells goes way further than rockets. The filing runs to 36 pages of risk factors alone, and the numbers inside match the ambition: a $28 trillion total addressable market, a pay package tied to establishing a Mars colony, and a valuation target that would make it the largest IPO in American […]

techcrunch.title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’
techcrunch.summary: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.

techcrunch.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
techcrunch.summary: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.
